_meta.artifact_type: Independent QA Verdict — Wave 4 Lane-3 Phase-C ranks 51-100 (50 rows)
_meta.role: QA (independent adversarial review). Files-only. ZERO mutation of DB/manifest/ready/LEDGER/PROGRESS.
_meta.generated_by: opus-4.8 gate-lane3 agent SELF-QA pass (same session as the normalization; mislabeled 'Fable PM' at authoring — corrected by Fable PM 2026-07-02). Independence caveat: web re-verification was real but performed by the same agent that normalized.
_meta.qa_method: Independent web verification of all 5 merge_eligible_new own-locator URLs + PE/DSO acquisition sourcing + owner identity cross-checks. WebFetch + WebSearch used to independently verify each claim. Agent/Gate summaries were NOT relied on — primary sources were re-fetched.

systemic_defect_rationale: The gate correctly applied the evidence bar, T3 policy, protected network discipline, and scope holds across 49 of 50 rows. One row (rank 83, Archer Dentistry) has a specific evidence gap — the 'dentist-owned' claim is not confirmed by independent evidence. This is a single-row correction, not a systemic methodology error. The surname-batch rejection logic, protected-network holds, specialist scope holds, and the two T5 branded_dso promotions are all correct.

T3_rows_must_fix: 8d81d4516f493d1e (Archer Dentistry, rank 83) — PENDING ownership confirmation. Do not count toward floor until resolved.
overall_floor_impact_confirmed.note: Gate's +2 T5 corporate floor claim is correct and not overstated. Gate's +3 T3 claim is overstated by 1 pending rank 83 fix. Corrected T3 confirmed = +2. The 3rd T3 (rank 83) is conditional on resolving the dentist-ownership gap.

rank_54_United_Dental_Centers.mso_check: NONE FOUND. Website explicitly describes 'family owned and locally operated — not driven by profits or quotas.'

rank_83_Archer_Dentistry_Chicago.must_fix_action: DOWNGRADE to hold_needs_more_evidence pending dentist-owner identity confirmation
rank_83_Archer_Dentistry_Chicago.address_source: WebFetch of archerdentistry.com/chicago-booker-area/ confirmed '654 E 47th St, Chicago, IL 60653, USA'
rank_83_Archer_Dentistry_Chicago.multi_location_verified: PARTIAL — multiple Archer Dentistry locations exist across the website (Brighton Park, Booker Area, Naperville, Hickory Hills, Munster) but own about-page does not list all locations with addresses

ownership_qa_finding.gate_claim: 'Dr. Hamza Mohammed named owner/founder' per archerdentistrychi.com team page
ownership_qa_finding.qa_finding: UNVERIFIED and potentially incorrect. Independent QA fetch of archerdentistrychicago.com/about-archer-dentistry/ found: 'Hamza Mohammed — Business Administrator' (not dentist, not owner). Actual clinical dentists are Dr. Suman Chennadi (DMD), Dr. Apeksha Singh (DDS), Dr. Rahul Jadhav (DDS), Dr. Prasanth Dommaraju (DDS). None are listed as owner.
ownership_qa_finding.note_on_two_urls: Gate cited 'archerdentistrychi.com/team/hamza-mohammed/' while QA independently fetched 'archerdentistrychicago.com/about-archer-dentistry/' — these may be different domain variants. However, both variants show Mohammed in a business/admin role, not as a dentist. The core finding stands regardless of which domain variant is canonical.
ownership_qa_finding.critical_issue: T3 'dentist_multi' explicitly requires the practice to be DENTIST-OWNED. If Mohammed is a business administrator and not a licensed dentist, Chicago Dentistry LLC fails the T3 'dentist-owned' requirement. Without knowing the owner's credentials, the practice could be: (a) T3 if a licensed dentist owns Chicago Dentistry LLC through Mohammed as their admin; (b) T4 stealth_dso if an external business entity owns multiple locations through a management structure; (c) just an independent non-dentist-owned group. None of these are confirmed.

rank_83_Archer_Dentistry_Chicago.required_fix: Illinois Secretary of State business lookup for 'Chicago Dentistry LLC' to identify the registered agent/manager/owner, OR the practice website disclosing a dentist-owner name. Once a dentist-owner is confirmed, can re-evaluate T3 eligibility.
rank_83_Archer_Dentistry_Chicago.carry_forward_note: The exact-address locator evidence (654 E 47th St on archerdentistry.com/chicago-booker-area/) is preserved. If dentist-owner is later confirmed, this row can be promoted to merge_eligible_new T3 without re-verifying the address.

rank_88_Dental_Group_Chicago.address_source: Yelp listing (Updated June 2026): '1556 S Michigan Ave, Chicago, Illinois' with phone +13125880043. Google search results return dentalgroupofchicago.com/our-office/ as the office page. WebFetch of dentalgroupofchicago.com/contact/ returned HTTP 403 (Cloudflare block), but Yelp + Voyage Chicago article independently confirm the address.
rank_88_Dental_Group_Chicago.ownership_source: Voyage Chicago interview: 'Dr. Alexander Reznikov purchased Dental Group of Chicago, located in the South Loop in May of 2015.' LinkedIn confirms: 'Owner at J & J Dental Support' (Reznikov's separate entity — consistent with dentist-owner structure). ZocDoc shows 3 locations under Dental Group of Chicago (South Loop, Bloomingdale, EGP).
rank_88_Dental_Group_Chicago.multi_location_source: ZocDoc profile 'Dental Group of Chicago/Bloomingdale/EGP' confirms at least 3 IL locations. Gate claimed 2 (South Loop + Bucktown/Cityview Dental Arts); QA finds potentially 3. Either way T3 multi-location bar is exceeded.
rank_88_Dental_Group_Chicago.mso_check: J & J Dental Support (Reznikov's entity) appears to be an internal management entity for his own practice group, not an external MSO. No external DSO/PE sponsor found.
rank_88_Dental_Group_Chicago.qa_note: PASS. Owner is a licensed dentist (DDS). Multi-location confirmed. No external MSO. T3 policy ratification correctly applied.

rank_100_Advanced_Family_Dental_Shorewoo.address_source: WebFetch of greatlakesdentalpartners.com/company/locations/ confirmed 'Advanced Family Dental & Orthodontics of Shorewood, 150 Brookforest Ave Shorewood, IL 60404, (815) 729-2300'
rank_100_Advanced_Family_Dental_Shorewoo.dso_evidence: GLDP own press release (greatlakesdentalpartners.com/news/2018/06/11/) confirmed: 'Chicagoland Smile Group doubles in size with Advanced Family Dental partnership' — Advanced Family Dental and Orthodontics, PC affiliated with GLDP in June 2018. Addition of AFD's 14 offices expanded GLDP to 28 locations.

rank_100_Advanced_Family_Dental_Shorewoo.qa_note: PASS — strong DSO structure evidence. GLDP own locator confirms exact Shorewood address. Press release + PE backer both independently confirmed.

must_fix_items.reason: T3 requires dentist-owned practice. Gate claimed Dr. Hamza Mohammed as 'named owner' on team page. Independent QA verification found Mohammed is listed as 'Business Administrator,' not as a dentist or owner, on the Archer Dentistry about page. The 4 listed dentists (Chennadi, Singh, Jadhav, Dommaraju) are clinical staff; none are identified as owner. The owner of Chicago Dentistry LLC is undisclosed in all public evidence found. Without confirming a dentist-owner, T3 cannot be assigned.
must_fix_items.evidence_preserved: Address confirmed (654 E 47th St, Chicago IL 60653 on archerdentistry.com/chicago-booker-area/). Multi-location structure is plausible. Once dentist-owner identity is confirmed via IL SOS lookup or website disclosure, this row can return to merge_eligible_new T3 without re-verification of address.
